name: MushiMushi
description: User-friction intelligence layer for software teams. Captures, classifies, and auto-fixes bugs reported by users.

classify_bug.description: Classify a user-reported bug using dual-LLM pipeline (Haiku fast-filter + Sonnet deep analysis)
classify_bug.input: Bug report with description, environment, console logs, network logs
classify_bug.output: Classification with category, severity, root cause, reproduction steps, ontology tags

generate_fix.description: Generate a code fix for a classified bug using AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, or generic MCP)
generate_fix.output: Git branch with fix, PR URL, files changed

verify_fix.description: Verify a fix via Playwright visual + interaction testing
verify_fix.output: Pass/fail with visual diff score and interaction results

query_knowledge_graph.description: Query the bug knowledge graph for blast radius, regressions, and related issues
query_knowledge_graph.output: Graph traversal results with affected areas
